name: Chilled Eggplant Appetizer
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Bake eggplant and green peppers in the preheated oven for 1 hour.
3. Turn the eggplant and green peppers after 30 minutes; let cool completely.
4. Peel the eggplant; if it is watery, squeeze out excess water and drain on paper towels.
5. Remove skin and seeds from the green peppers.
6. Chop the peeled eggplant and prepared green peppers.
7. Combine the chopped eggplant and peppers in a bowl.
8. When ready to serve, add diced raw onion, lemon juice, salad oil, salt, and pepper to taste.
9. Chill and serve as an appetizer.
This recipe freezes well. Freeze during summer when eggplants are plentiful and defrost later, adding the remaining ingredients.
